Interface SliderWidgetBuilder<SELF extends SliderWidgetBuilder<SELF,T>, T extends Number & Comparable<T>>

All Superinterfaces:
WidgetBuilder<SELF,T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
SliderWidgetBuilderImpl, SliderWidgetBuilderImpl.DoubleSliderWidgetBuilder, SliderWidgetBuilderImpl.IntSliderWidgetBuilder
public interface SliderWidgetBuilder<SELF extends SliderWidgetBuilder<SELF,T>, T extends Number & Comparable<T>> extends WidgetBuilder<SELF,T>

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    SELF
    max(T max)
    The maximum value for the slider.
    SELF
    min(T min)
    The minimum value for the slider.
    default SELF
    range(T min, T max)
    Convenience method for setting min(Number) and max(Number) at once.
    SELF
    step(T step)
    The step distance for the slider.

    Methods inherited from interface WidgetBuilder

    build, displayName, tooltip, tooltip

  • Method Details

    • min

      SELF min(T min)
      The minimum value for the slider. By default, this is the minimum value of the property (if present), but can be changed to differ from the allowed range of the property.
      Parameters:
      min - The minimum value
      Returns:
      The builder for chaining

    • max

      SELF max(T max)
      The maximum value for the slider. By default, this is the maximum value of the property (if present), but can be changed to differ from the allowed range of the property.
      Parameters:
      max - The maximum value
      Returns:
      The builder for chaining

    • range

      default SELF range(T min, T max)
      Convenience method for setting min(Number) and max(Number) at once.
      Parameters:
      min - The minimum value of the slider
      max - The maximum value of the slider
      Returns:
      The builder for chaining

    • step

      SELF step(T step)
      The step distance for the slider. When set, the slider can only set values in this increment. A step of 5 will mean your slider has the values min, min+5, min+10, ....
      Parameters:
      step - The step of the slider
      Returns:
      The builder for chaining
